name: Central Station Kid
description: Grew up in the stacked housing blocks of a major orbital station, where the heating worked most days. Spent more time behind terminals than under open sky.

name: Belt Colony Brat
description: Raised on a hollowed-out rock somewhere in the main belt, where kids learned to patch suits before they learned to read. The colony ran on shift work and stubbornness.

name: Orbital Kombinat
description: Born and raised on a spinning industrial kombinat that never stopped creaking.

name: Frontier Outpost
description: Grew up in a prefab settlement on a barely-surveyed rock.

name: Transport Fleet Child
description: Spent childhood aboard a string of state cargo haulers running freight between stations.

name: Research Outpost
description: Raised at a remote research station staffed by a skeleton crew of tired scientists.
